title: Chapter 5 Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of Chapter 5 concepts!

questions.question: What implies a function returns absolutely no value?
questions.explanation: void functions act but do not send data back via the return statement.

questions.question: What character signifies the arrow function shortcut?
questions.explanation: The fat arrow => is used to shorten one-liner return expressions.

questions.question: Arguments are variables passed INTO a function when it is called.
questions.explanation: Arguments provide specialized input data to the function parameters for dynamic behavior.
